---
title: "Load_16S"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-20"
---

#### Load 16S amplicon sequence data from qza files in the directory written in "path_qm" in "scripts/path.R".

<details><summary>Settings and preps</summary><div>

## load packages and paths

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(qiime2R)
# Load the 16S amplicon sequence data from the specified directory
# The path to the qza files is defined in "path_qm" in "scripts
source("../scripts/path.R")
```

</div></details>

# import data

```{r}
# 16S
table_16S <- read_qza(paste0(path_qm, "/Analysis/NoContam/table_16S_nocontam.qza"))
tree_16S <- read_qza(paste0(path_qm, "/Analysis/phylogeny/tree_rooted_16S.qza"))
```
